mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top
mapper.insert: insert into tb_announcement (create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN})

insert into tb_announcement
create_time,
update_time,
title,
content,
is_top,
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
mapper.update:
update tb_announcement
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_announcement set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_announcement (create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN})

insert into tb_announcement (create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN})
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), title=values(title), content=values(content), is_top=values(is_top)
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_announcement where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_announcement
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
title = #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
is_top = #{item.isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

mapper.insert:
insert into tb_announcement (create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top) values
(

DEFAULT,

DEFAULT,

DEFAULT,

DEFAULT
)

id,
create_time, update_time, title, content, is_top,
values

#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},

id,
create_time,
update_time,
title,
content,
is_top,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
mapper.select: select is_top as isTop, count(*) as count from tb_announcement group by is_top
